title: S + be supposed to + V

formulas.zh: 某人應該做某事；某事理應發生
某人本應做某事（但實際未做）

explanation: be supposed to 表達義務、期望或推測，含「應該」之意，暗示存在預期或規範。現在式表示目前應該做的事；過去式 was/were supposed to 則表達「本應但未能」的遺憾感，通常暗示該行動未完成或未達成。此句型常見於日常交流、規則說明及事實敘述中，與 should 相似但語氣略顯正式。

examples.eng: You are supposed to submit your homework by Friday.
examples.chi: 你應該在星期五之前提交你的功課。

examples.eng: The meeting was supposed to start at 9 AM, but it was delayed.
examples.chi: 會議原本應該在上午9點開始，但被延遲了。

examples.eng: Students are supposed to follow the school regulations.
examples.chi: 學生應該遵守學校規定。

examples.eng: He was supposed to arrive yesterday, but his flight was cancelled.
examples.chi: 他本應昨天到達，但他的班機被取消了。

extension.tip: be supposed to 帶有未達成或期望落空的隱含意義，尤其在過去式；should 則較為直接的建議或義務。在陳述規則、計畫或期望時優先使用 be supposed to，比 should 更正式、更具約束力。注意與 be expected to 的區別：前者強調應該/規範，後者強調期望。

examples.test: He should finish the project by next week. vs. He is supposed to finish the project by next week.
examples.result: → 前者為建議，後者為明確義務或規範；後者更正式、更具約束力

examples.test: You were supposed to call me yesterday. vs. You should have called me yesterday.
examples.result: → 前者暗示有既定計畫未完成，後者則為後悔的建議；前者實際性更強

examples.test: The package is supposed to arrive tomorrow. vs. The package should arrive tomorrow.
examples.result: → 前者指預期/計畫狀態，後者指邏輯推測；前者更確定

extension.note: 現在式是「應該現在做」，過去式是「本應當時做但沒做」——時態決定是否含遺憾感。

exercises.sentence: Students are supposed to arrive at school before 8 AM.
exercises.translation: 學生應該在上午8點前到校。

parts: complete by the end of this month.
exercises.sentence: The project is supposed to be complete by the end of this month.
exercises.translation: 該專案應該在本月底前完成。

parts: attend the conference, but she got sick.
exercises.sentence: She was supposed to attend the conference, but she got sick.
exercises.translation: 她本應參加會議，但她生病了。

parts: know the truth about what happened last year.
exercises.sentence: We are supposed to know the truth about what happened last year.
exercises.translation: 我們應該知道去年發生的事情的真相。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 描述學生應該完成的作業截止日期
mc_exercises.question_eng: You _______ to submit your homework by Friday.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「are supposed」。be supposed to 為固定片語，表示「應該」的義務。選項 B 缺少過去分詞 supposed，文法錯誤。選項 C 改變了片語結構，意思不符。選項 D supposing 為現在分詞，無法搭配 are 形成此句型。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 說明會議本應但未能準時開始的情況
mc_exercises.question_eng: The meeting _______ to start at 9 AM, but it was delayed by an hour.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「was supposed」。過去式 was supposed to 表示「本應但未能」的遺憾感，搭配後文「延遲」的事實。選項 B 現在式不符合已發生的過去事件。選項 C 現在完成式與後文過去時態不搭配。選項 D would be 帶有假設意味，不適合陳述事實。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 表達對某人應該知道某事的期望
mc_exercises.question_eng: As a professional accountant, you _______ to be familiar with the latest tax regulations.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「are supposed」。be supposed to 表達基於職業角色的期望和規範。選項 A expect 意思相近但搭配不同，通常用「be expected to」。選項 C D 雖文法正確，但題目強調規範性期望時，be supposed to 最恰當，語氣更正式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 推測過去應該發生但未確認的事件
mc_exercises.question_eng: According to the itinerary, they _______ to have arrived in Tokyo by yesterday evening, yet we haven't heard from them.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「were supposed」。be supposed to + have + 過去分詞表示「本應已完成但未確認」的推測。選項 B supposing 為現在分詞，無法表達此意。選項 C had supposed 為過去完成式但非 be supposed to 結構。選項 D 進行式不適合此語境，且文意不符。

translation_exercises.answer: Students are supposed to arrive at school on time.
hints: 提示1：現在式 be supposed to 表示目前應該做的事
提示2：注意 arrive at（到達地點）的搭配，不可用 go to

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 你本來應該昨天完成這份作業的。
translation_exercises.answer: You were supposed to finish this homework yesterday.
hints: 提示1：過去式 was/were supposed to 表達『本應但未能』的遺憾感
提示2：過去式用於描述昨天的預期行動，暗示該作業可能未完成

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 根據天氣預報，明天應該會下雨，所以我們不應該去登山。
translation_exercises.answer: According to the weather forecast, it is supposed to rain tomorrow, so we are not supposed to go hiking.
key_points: are not supposed to（否定形式）
hints: 提示1：be supposed to 除表義務外，也可用於推測或預期情況
提示2：注意否定形式為 be not supposed to，表示『不應該』或『不該』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 醫生告訴他應該每天運動至少三十分鐘，但他上週本應遵守這個建議卻沒有做到。
translation_exercises.answer: The doctor told him he is supposed to exercise for at least thirty minutes every day, but he was supposed to follow this advice last week but didn't.
key_points: 過去式 was supposed to 搭配but didn't
hints: 提示1：同一句子中結合現在式（一般規則）與過去式（未達成的期望）
提示2：『but didn't』強化過去式『本應但未能』的遺憾感，避免單用過去式造成歧義
